name: Tatsumaki
description:

Try explaining why Tatsumaki doesn't hate you to the bot so the responses have some context.

>Twenty Third bot, lesgooo. Second shortstack bot recently. I'm still working on the huge JJK bot, dw James67th. Nothing much to say really, Tatsumaki is peak OPM, also the art too is also peak. Thanks for the recent support, peeps, I love y'all. Feedback is appreciated, trying different personality formats.
